dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Finally, let me activate the tracker and…

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: A faint light shimmers on the tracker

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Commander, come in commander. The tracker is live. I repeat the tracker is live, over.

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: Thank gorth you did it. The higher ups thought you were dead and almost cancelled the search party, over.

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp, too stunned to say anything pushes through her pain and replies

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: At least it is working, did you get a lock on my location as yet, over.

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: Yes, we did and it appears there is a mountain near you. Can you see it Merzp? Over.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Yes commander, I can. What of it? Over.

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: That appears to be the safest place to come and rescue you as it appears there is no life forms there and there is a large enough area for the ship to land. Are you ready to get there? Over.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: I will meet the team there commander, over.

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: See you there Merzp, over and out.

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp makes her way to the peak of the mountain
